name: ownware-finance
description: Senior finance analyst across all five FSI verticals — investment banking, equity research, private equity, wealth management, and corporate-finance ops. Builds DCFs, comps, LBOs, three-statement models; drafts pitchbooks, CIMs, IC memos, earnings recaps, KYC reviews, client packs. Cites every figure to a primary source; refuses to fabricate numbers; refuses to give investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice.

avatar.symbol: <text x="32" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="32" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">$</text><line x1="14" y1="50" x2="50" y2="50" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-opacity="0.4"/>

requiredSecrets.label: FRED API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Macro series — rates, CPI, GDP, unemployment, treasury yields, credit spreads. Free key, registers in 30s.

requiredSecrets.label: FactSet API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Equity prices, fundamentals, consensus estimates, ownership, transcripts. Enterprise subscription — contact your FactSet rep.

requiredSecrets.label: Bloomberg Terminal API
requiredSecrets.usage: Real-time pricing, fixed income, FX, derivatives, news, macro feeds. Bloomberg Terminal subscription required (BLPAPI).

requiredSecrets.label: S&P Capital IQ API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Public + private company data, M&A history, transactions, credit ratings. Enterprise subscription.

requiredSecrets.label: PitchBook API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Private market data — PE/VC deals, fund performance, sponsor activity. Enterprise subscription, separate contract from PitchBook Platform.

requiredSecrets.label: Daloopa API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Standardised KPIs and operating metrics extracted from public filings. Subscription tiers — contact sales.

requiredSecrets.label: Morningstar API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Fund / ETF data, ratings, asset allocation, manager research. Enterprise subscription.

requiredSecrets.label: Moody's API key
requiredSecrets.usage: Credit ratings, KYC / AML reference data on 600M+ entities. Register on the Moody's API Hub; access depends on product tier.

subagents.name: filings-explorer
subagents.description: Pulls and navigates SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, S-1, S-4, proxy/DEF 14A) and FRED macro series. Returns extracted sections with page references and source URLs. Read-only. Use first when the analysis needs primary-source numbers.

subagents.name: valuation-builder
subagents.description: Runs valuation math: DCF, comps, LBO, sum-of-parts, merger consequences. Takes inputs from filings-explorer; returns models with every assumption labelled and every formula traceable. No web access — compute only.

subagents.name: earnings-reviewer
subagents.description: Summarises a quarterly print: headline beat/miss vs consensus, guidance changes, top three call quotes, KPI trends. Read-only. Use when the user asks 'what happened' with a recent earnings release.

subagents.name: market-researcher
subagents.description: Sector / peer / competitor / thematic research and idea screening. Pulls market structure, peer landscapes, recent deals, news. Read-only. Use when the analysis needs context broader than one company.

subagents.name: diligence-runner
subagents.description: Builds and works through structured checklists: PE diligence (commercial / financial / legal / IT), KYC document review, sanctions / PEP screening, GL break tracing. Returns the checklist with findings and gaps.

subagents.name: deck-author
subagents.description: Drafts structured deliverables — pitchbooks, CIMs, IC memos, one-pagers, client review packs, financial plans. No web, no shell. Takes inputs from the other helpers and assembles them into the firm's section/page conventions.
